hero.productBadge: HM-500 Epoxy Anchor System · 12 International Certifications · 7 Independent Labs
hero.headline: We set the material standard.
hero.body: Every adhesive anchor Concrete Surgeons installs uses HM-500 — 14.98 N/mm² bonding strength, verified by 7 independent international laboratories across 12 certifications. We supply the material and install it ourselves. No subcontracting. No substitutions. Serving Egypt and the Gulf since 2007.

services.headline: Six specialized services. One accountable contractor.
services.body: We don't subcontract our core work. Every diamond saw blade, every CFRP laminate, every anchor is installed by our own certified crews.

trust.headline: 17 years. Hundreds of projects. Zero structural failures.
trust.body: We cut our teeth on the Dubai Metro and Abu Dhabi's major infrastructure. That precision discipline is now the standard for every project we take in Egypt.

projects.headline: Projects that demanded more than ordinary contractors could deliver.

clients.headline: The contractors, developers, and owners who call us first.

cta.headline: Your structure. Our precision.
cta.body: Tell us about your project. We respond within 24 hours.

about.headline: Concrete Surgeons
about.body: A surgeon doesn't cut randomly. Every incision is planned, every margin controlled, every consequence considered before the blade touches the surface. We apply that philosophy to every concrete project we take.
about.founding: Founded in 2007 in the UAE, we built our reputation on major infrastructure — the Dubai Metro, Abu Dhabi's commercial towers, high-reach demolition on active construction sites. In 2015, Eng. Khaled Allam brought that expertise to Egypt, opening our Cairo operations at New Nozha.
about.today: Today, Concrete Surgeons is Egypt's most technically advanced specialist in diamond sawing, controlled demolition, structural retrofitting, drilling, firestop, and concrete polishing. We operate our own equipment fleet, train our own crews, and accept full accountability for every project we execute.
about.value1Body: We never rush a structural cut or an anchor installation. Precision is the only acceptable standard.
about.value2Body: We don't subcontract our core work. If we sign the contract, our crew executes it.
about.value3Body: Every project plan accounts for adjacent structures, live utilities, and occupied spaces.

comparison.headline: HM-500 vs Hilti RE 500 V3
comparison.intro: For engineers and project managers who need the data. Every figure below is sourced from independent laboratory test reports — not marketing copy.
comparison.disclaimer: Hilti RE 500 V3 figures sourced from publicly available Hilti product documentation. HM-500 data from Shanghai Horse Construction Technology laboratory test reports. Concrete Surgeons makes no claim on behalf of either manufacturer.
comparison.curingNote: Egypt's typical ambient temperature (25–40°C) means standard site cure time is 6–12 hours — critical for scheduling poured-concrete operations.
comparison.certHeadline: 12 international certifications. 7 independent labs. Zero marketing figures.
comparison.downloadBody: All 12 certification records, full mechanical properties, curing tables, and installation specifications.
comparison.ctaBody: We supply and install. Tell us the load requirements and we'll confirm the anchor spec.
